lldb_controller.h(3) Library Functions Manual lldb_controller.h(3)

NAME

lldb_controller.h - LLDB process attachment and control wrapper.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct ascii_query::ThreadInfo
Thread information. struct ascii_query::FrameInfo
Stack frame information. struct ascii_query::VariableInfo
Variable information (from LLDB SBValue). struct ascii_query::BreakpointInfo
Breakpoint information. class ascii_query::LLDBController
LLDB process controller.

Namespaces


namespace ascii_query

Enumerations


enum class ascii_query::ProcessState { ascii_query::Invalid, ascii_query::Running, ascii_query::Stopped, ascii_query::Exited, ascii_query::Crashed, ascii_query::Detached }
Process state enumeration.

Detailed Description

LLDB process attachment and control wrapper.

This class wraps the LLDB SB API to provide process attachment, control, and variable inspection. It's designed for external debugging - the controller runs as a separate process from the target.

Thread Safety: Most LLDB operations are NOT thread-safe. This class assumes single-threaded use from the HTTP server's request handler thread.

Definition in file lldb_controller.h.
